# A-1 Electricals — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

> A-1 Electricals is an ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer of power cable accessories based in Rajkot, Gujarat, India. Founded in 2006, the company supplies utilities, EPC contractors, OEMs, and infrastructure developers worldwide.

## Company

- **Full name**: A-1 Electricals
- **Type**: Manufacturer (B2B)
- **Founded**: 2006
- **Location**: G-1053, Lodhika GIDC Metoda, Kalavad Road, Rajkot 360021, Gujarat, India
- **Certifications**: ISO 9001:2015, CE, RoHS, IEC 61238-1, TÜV Certified, FIEO Member
- **Max voltage rating**: 550 kV
- **Product variants**: 500+
- **Website**: https://a1-electricals-test.vercel.app

## Products

A-1 Electricals manufactures a comprehensive range of power cable accessories:

- **Shear Bolt Cable Lugs & Connectors** — insulated and bare, for medium and high voltage applications
- **EHV Substation Connectors** — aluminium compression and bolted connectors for extra-high voltage substations up to 550 kV
- **Copper, Aluminium & Bimetallic Cable Lugs** — compression and mechanical types per IEC 61238-1
- **Cable Cleats** — aluminium and polyamide, for single-core and trefoil cable installations
- **Cable Terminations & Joints** — heat shrink and cold shrink systems
- **Brass Cable Glands & Accessories** — IP68 rated industrial cable glands
- **Flexible Copper Braids & Busbars** — laminated and solid copper busbars for switchgear
- **Custom / OEM Components** — tailor-made parts for switchgear, transformers, and electrical equipment

## Standards & Compliance

Products are designed and tested to: BS, DIN, IS, IEC 61238-1, IEC 62271, CE Directive, RoHS Directive.

## Markets Served

Power transmission, renewable energy (solar, wind), industrial infrastructure, EPC contractors, utilities, switchgear OEMs, transformer manufacturers.
